title: Mondoro Heat Wave
lead: Mondoro is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +7.00. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mondoro is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 23.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 4.0 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating that no heating is required, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
